children.text: leads to mutual understanding and comprehension; and
emphasizes trust, respect, and shared responsibility.

children.heading: Requirement
children.label: b Requirement
children.text: The Secretary shall ensure that the Service confers, to the maximum extent practicable, with urban Indian organizations in carrying out this chapter.
